subject: frame alignment
body:
Dear all,

I encounter the issue with the Initial step to perform frame alignment 
using my own data.
After I did the following command, 

WarpTools create_settings \
--folder_data /mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all \
--folder_processing 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/warp_frameseries 
\
--output 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/warp_frameseries_setting 
\
--extension "*.tif" \
--angpix 2.1488 \
--gain_path 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/CountRef_May15_16.31.08.mrc 
\
--gain_flip_x \
--exposure 3.5


I got the error

Running command create_settings with:
output = 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/warp_frameseries_setting
folder_processing = 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/warp_frameseries
folder_data = /mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all
recursive = False
extension = *.tif
angpix = 2.1488
bin = null
bin_angpix = null
gain_path = 
/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/CountRef_May15_16.31.08.mrc
defects_path = null
gain_flip_x = True
gain_flip_y = False
gain_transpose = False
exposure = 3.5
eer_ngroups = 40
eer_groupexposure = null
tomo_dimensions = null

Unhandled exception. System.UnauthorizedAccessException: Access to the path 
'/mnt/staging/rwatanabe/DataProcess/Warp_tool/NP_delta601_all/warp_frameseries_setting' 
is denied.
 ---> System.IO.IOException: Permission denied
   --- End of inner exception stack trace ---
   at Interop.ThrowExceptionForIoErrno(ErrorInfo errorInfo, String path, 
Boolean isDirError)
   at Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle.Open(String path, 
OpenFlags flags, Int32 mode, Boolean failForSymlink, Boolean& wasSymlink, 
Func`4 createOpenException)
   at Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle.Open(String fullPath, 
FileMode mode, FileAccess access, FileShare share, FileOptions options, 
Int64 preallocationSize, UnixFileMode openPermissions, Int64& fileLength, 
UnixFileMode& filePermissions, Boolean failForSymlink, Boolean& wasSymlink, 
Func`4 createOpenException)
   at System.IO.Strategies.OSFileStreamStrategy..ctor(String path, FileMode 
mode, FileAccess access, FileShare share, FileOptions options, Int64 
preallocationSize, Nullable`1 unixCreateMode)
   at System.IO.File.Create(String path)
   at Warp.OptionsWarp.Save(String path) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1732560643671/work/WarpLib/OptionsWarp.cs:line 
177
   at WarpTools.Commands.CreateSettings.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1732560643671/work/WarpTools/Commands/CreateSettings.cs:line 
236
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1732560643671/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
30
   at Warp.Tools.CommandLineParserHelper.ParseAndRun(String[] args, Func`2 
run, Type[] verbs, String appName) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1732560643671/work/WarpLib/Tools/CommandLineParserHelper.cs:line 
26
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Main(String[] args) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1732560643671/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
17
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.<Main>(String[] args)
Aborted (core dumped)

I changed permission to the entire folder using chmod -R 777.
But I still get this error. 
If you know how to avoid this, please let me know.
Thank you
Reika
